_readme: Host this file at https://aquilo.gg/sf-notices.json (or wherever — point StreamFusion's SF_NOTICES_URL at it).
The running SF app fetches this on startup (deferred ~12s) and renders the highest-severity non-dismissed notice as a banner.
Schema (unknown fields ignored, so you can extend without breaking old clients):
id           required, unique. Dismissal uses this as the localStorage key.
severity     'info' | 'warning' | 'critical'. Default 'info'. Critical is amber-red — reserve for urgent things.
body longer text. Plain text with ... allowed. Everything else is escaped.
minVersion   only show if the app version is >= this. Use for 'this feature arrived in 1.5' messaging.
maxVersion   only show if the app version is <= this. Use for 'you're on an old version, please update' messaging.
actionLabel  optional. If set with actionUrl, adds a button to the banner.
actionUrl    opens in the user's default browser when the action button is clicked.
expiresAt    ISO-8601 date. Notice is ignored after this timestamp.
dismissible  default true. Set to false for notices that must be seen (very rare — be careful).
To retire a notice, either remove it from the array or add an expiresAt in the past.
Empty notices[] array is fine — just a JSON file with {"notices": []} means 'nothing active'.

notices.title: New in 1.4.8:
notices.body: in-app notice system (this banner!), plus silent auto-updates so future versions install themselves when you close SF.

notices._comment: Example of an update-nudge for anyone still on 1.4.7 or older once 1.5.0 ships.
notices.title: Update available:
notices.body: StreamFusion 1.5 is out. Your app is set to auto-install on next close, but you can grab the installer early.

notices._comment: Example of a critical notice (Discord proxy outage, Patreon API issue, etc.).
notices.title: Discord+ webhooks down:
notices.body: Discord's webhook API is throwing 500s — posts will retry automatically. No action needed.
